chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1071 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on MA No 7750/2017 31.01.2018. Mr Hameedullah Dahri Advocatge for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w ASI S. Laeeque Hyder P.S.A-Section Nawabshah Inspector M. Iqbal Wassan P.S.B-section ASI Mariyam P.S.Women Police Station Nawabshah -=-=- Learned Asstt:A.G files comments of respondents No.1,2,3,4 & 6, which are taken on record, copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that alleged detenue is the daughter of petitioner namely Nahaj alias Afshan has been recovered and is with the petitioner at the moment, therefore, according to him very purpose of the filing of this petition stands achieved. In view of above this petition stands disposed of as withdrawn alongwith listed application. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to agitate her other rights with regard to the recovery of articles and amount which were taken away by the official respondents in the appropriate forum, if she so desire and if such proceedings is filed, the trial court is directed to decide the same in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
